puzzle.hint: A seat of power for a king or queen.
puzzle.arabicVerse: قَالَ نَكِّرُوا۟ لَهَا عَرْشَهَا نَنظُرْ أَتَهْتَدِىٓ أَمْ تَكُونُ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
puzzle.verse: 27:41 — He said, "Disguise for her her throne; we will see whether she will be guided [to truth] or will be of those who is not guided."
